name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Dog Cardiac Chicken & Rice 3kg
description: How it works: Formula containing limited sodium (salt) and phosphorus, Content rich in essential fatty acids, L-Carnitine (effective use of energy), Taurine rich content (protection of heart health), High fiber content (healthy digestive system), Rich strong immunity with probiotic and prebiotic content. High quality protein sources and limited energy Ingredients: Chicken Protein, Brown Rice, Eggs, Peas, Sugar Beet Pulp, Chicken Oil, Corn Gluten Meal, Powdered Cellulose, Hydrolyzed Chicken Liver, Salmon Oil, Fish Protein, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Dried Algae, MOS, ? -Glucan, Tocopherol, Yucca, Wild Seabuckthorn. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
